description: Query local Chrome browsing history from a snapshot index; no remote API spec.

novel_features.name: Chrome Journeys Topic Clusters
novel_features.description: Surfaces Chrome's own Journeys topic clusters from local history databases.

novel_features.name: Session Timeline Reconstruction
novel_features.description: Reconstructs session-level browsing timelines using timestamp gaps and device filters.

novel_features.name: Rabbithole Drift Detection
novel_features.description: Detects sessions that drift from productive starts into distracting browsing patterns.

novel_features.name: Accumulating History Archive
novel_features.description: Opt-in sticky archive that preserves browsing history past Chrome's pruning/clears; sync --accumulate appends, archive enable/disable/status/clobber/reset/vacuum manage it, with scoped read routing so rich Chrome-only commands keep reading the live snapshot.
